ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., forward, defense, goalie) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player currently plays for */,
  "career_goals" INTEGER /* Total career goals scored by the player */,
  "career_assists" INTEGER /* Total career assists by the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_position" TEXT /* Draft position of the player */,
  "current_contract" TEXT /* Current contract details of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Team that played at home */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Team that played away */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "officials" TEXT /* Names of the officials who officiated the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the game details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scout, coach) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the user's information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being observed */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being observed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user recording the note */,
  "note_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the note type */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating or score assigned to the note (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time the note was recorded */,
  "video_clip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video clip related to the note */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the note was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_note_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("note_type_id") REFERENCES note_types ("note_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "note_types" (
  "note_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note type */,
  "note_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the note type (e.g., offense, defense, special teams) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the note type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the note type was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_clips" (
  "clip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video clip */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player in the clip */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the clip is from */,
  "clip_url" TEXT /* URL of the video clip */,
  "clip_description" TEXT /* Description of the clip */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Exact time the video clip was recorded */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the video clip */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the video clip was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_clips_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_clips_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties the player received */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal by the player */,
  "faceoff_wins" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff wins by the player */,
  "faceoff_losses" INTEGER /* Number of faceoff losses by the player */,
  "ice_time" TEXT /* Total ice time of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the player performance was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "game_id")
)
